channel.title: 🚀 Ultimate AI Feed - Authority First, Signal Over Noise
channel.description: Top 10 daily: semantic analysis, smart dedup, authority-first, quality over quantity.

item.title: [1] [大V/权威] Sam Altman responds to ‘incendiary’ New Yorker article after attack on his home

📄 Summary: The OpenAI CEO's new blog post responds to both an apparent attack on his home and an in-depth New Yorker profile raising questions about his trustworthiness....

item.title: [4] [大V/权威] Is Anthropic limiting the release of Mythos to protect the internet — or Anthropic?
item.description:
📊 Score: 136 | Category: 大V/权威

📡 Source: TechCrunch | Domain: techcrunch.com

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:TechCrunch(+15)
  • ✓A-Domain:techcrunch.com(+30)
  • ⭐A-Authority:anthropic(+70)
  • ✓Industry-Gate:pass(+20)
  • real_release
  • TimeFactor:×0.8

📄 Summary: Anthropic said this week that it limited the release of its newest model, dubbed Mythos, because it is too capable of finding security exploits in software relied upon by users around the world. Are real cybersecurity concerns a cover for a bigger problem at the frontier lab?...

item.title: [5] [模型算法] Cram Less to Fit More: Training Data Pruning Improves Memorization of Facts
item.description:
📊 Score: 128 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L2-Tech:pruning(+25)
  • edge_optimization
  • TimeFactor:×0.8

📄 Summary: Large language models (LLMs) can struggle to memorize factual knowledge in their parameters, often leading to hallucinations and poor performance on knowledge-intensive tasks. In this paper, we formalize fact memorization from an information-theoretic perspective and study how training data distributions affect fact accuracy. We show that fact accu...

item.title: [7] [模型算法] PSI: Shared State as the Missing Layer for Coherent AI-Generated Instruments in Personal AI Agents
item.description:
📊 Score: 104 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • ✓Industry-Gate:pass(+20)
  • real_release
  • TimeFactor:×0.8

📄 Summary: Personal AI tools can now be generated from natural-language requests, but they often remain isolated after creation. We present PSI, a shared-state architecture that turns independently generated modules into coherent instruments: persistent, connected, and chat-complementary artifacts accessible through both GUIs and a generic chat agent. By publ...

item.title: [9] [模型算法] Less Approximates More: Harmonizing Performance and Confidence Faithfulness via Hybrid Post-Training for High-Stakes Tasks
item.description:
📊 Score: 96 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L2-Tech:distillation(+25)
  • ✓Industry-Gate:pass(+20)
  • TimeFactor:×0.8

📄 Summary: Large language models are increasingly deployed in high-stakes tasks, where confident yet incorrect inferences may cause severe real-world harm, bringing the previously overlooked issue of confidence faithfulness back to the forefront. A promising solution is to jointly optimize unsupervised Reinforcement Learning from Internal Feedback (RLIF) with...
